title: normalizeRange valid date strings
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'normalizeRange', args: {from: '2026-03-15T00:00:00Z', to: '2026-03-16T00:00:00Z'}}. Verify status 200. The response JSON should have result.from and result.to as valid ISO date strings. Verify result.from equals '2026-03-15T00:00:00.000Z' and result.to equals '2026-03-16T00:00:00.000Z'.

title: normalizeRange rejects invalid date strings
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'normalizeRange', args: {from: 'not-a-date', to: '2026-03-16T00:00:00Z'}}. Verify status 400. The response JSON should have error field containing 'Invalid time range'.

title: normalizeRange rejects from >= to
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'normalizeRange', args: {from: '2026-03-16T00:00:00Z', to: '2026-03-15T00:00:00Z'}}. Verify status 400. The response JSON error should contain 'from' and 'before'.

title: normalizeRange rejects equal dates
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'normalizeRange', args: {from: '2026-03-15T00:00:00Z', to: '2026-03-15T00:00:00Z'}}. Verify status 400. The response JSON error should contain 'before'.

title: resolveGoogleBoundary with dateTime returns timed event
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'resolveGoogleBoundary', args: {dateTime: '2026-03-15T14:30:00-07:00', date: null}}. Verify status 200. Response result should have isAllDay equal to false and iso should be a valid ISO string representing the same moment in UTC.

title: resolveGoogleBoundary with date only returns all-day event
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'resolveGoogleBoundary', args: {date: '2026-03-15', dateTime: null}}. Verify status 200. Response result should have isAllDay equal to true and iso equal to '2026-03-15T00:00:00.000Z'.

title: resolveGoogleBoundary with null input returns null
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'resolveGoogleBoundary', args: null}. Verify status 200. Response result should be null.

title: resolveGoogleBoundary with empty object returns null
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'resolveGoogleBoundary', args: {date: null, dateTime: null}}. Verify status 200. Response result should be null.

title: resolveGoogleBoundary prefers dateTime over date
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'resolveGoogleBoundary', args: {dateTime: '2026-03-15T10:00:00Z', date: '2026-03-15'}}. Verify status 200. Response result should have isAllDay equal to false (dateTime takes priority) and iso equal to '2026-03-15T10:00:00.000Z'.

title: resolveTodoistSchedule with due datetime
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'resolveTodoistSchedule', args: {due: {date: '2026-03-15', datetime: '2026-03-15T14:00:00Z'}, deadline: null}}. Verify status 200. Response result should have kind equal to 'due', isAllDay equal to false, and iso equal to '2026-03-15T14:00:00.000Z'.

title: resolveTodoistSchedule with due date only (all-day)
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'resolveTodoistSchedule', args: {due: {date: '2026-03-15', datetime: null}, deadline: null}}. Verify status 200. Response result should have kind equal to 'due', isAllDay equal to true, and iso equal to '2026-03-15T00:00:00.000Z'.

title: resolveTodoistSchedule with deadline only
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'resolveTodoistSchedule', args: {due: null, deadline: {date: '2026-03-20'}}}. Verify status 200. Response result should have kind equal to 'deadline', isAllDay equal to true, and iso equal to '2026-03-20T00:00:00.000Z'.

title: resolveTodoistSchedule with no due or deadline returns null
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'resolveTodoistSchedule', args: {due: null, deadline: null}}. Verify status 200. Response result should be null.

title: resolveTodoistSchedule prefers due datetime over deadline
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'resolveTodoistSchedule', args: {due: {date: '2026-03-15', datetime: '2026-03-15T09:00:00Z'}, deadline: {date: '2026-03-20'}}}. Verify status 200. Response result should have kind equal to 'due' (not 'deadline'), isAllDay false, and iso equal to '2026-03-15T09:00:00.000Z'.

title: isTodoistTaskInRange task within range returns true
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'isTodoistTaskInRange', args: {task: {due: {date: '2026-03-15', datetime: '2026-03-15T10:00:00Z'}, deadline: null}, range: {from: '2026-03-15T00:00:00Z', to: '2026-03-16T00:00:00Z'}, includeUndated: false}}. Verify status 200. Response result should be true.

title: isTodoistTaskInRange task outside range returns false
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'isTodoistTaskInRange', args: {task: {due: {date: '2026-03-20', datetime: '2026-03-20T10:00:00Z'}, deadline: null}, range: {from: '2026-03-15T00:00:00Z', to: '2026-03-16T00:00:00Z'}, includeUndated: false}}. Verify status 200. Response result should be false.

title: isTodoistTaskInRange undated task excluded when includeUndated false
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'isTodoistTaskInRange', args: {task: {due: null, deadline: null}, range: {from: '2026-03-15T00:00:00Z', to: '2026-03-16T00:00:00Z'}, includeUndated: false}}. Verify status 200. Response result should be false.

title: isTodoistTaskInRange undated task included when includeUndated true
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'isTodoistTaskInRange', args: {task: {due: null, deadline: null}, range: {from: '2026-03-15T00:00:00Z', to: '2026-03-16T00:00:00Z'}, includeUndated: true}}. Verify status 200. Response result should be true.

title: isTodoistTaskInRange task at range boundary (exact from) returns true
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'isTodoistTaskInRange', args: {task: {due: {date: '2026-03-15', datetime: '2026-03-15T00:00:00Z'}, deadline: null}, range: {from: '2026-03-15T00:00:00Z', to: '2026-03-16T00:00:00Z'}, includeUndated: false}}. Verify status 200. Response result should be true (boundary inclusive).

title: unknown function returns error
description: POST /api/test-helpers with JSON body {fn: 'nonExistentFunction', args: {}}. Verify status 400. Response error should contain 'Unknown function'.
